title: Kiss Of Fire
overview: A mysterious coffin purchased by a unaware business man has unleashed a great terror onto Tokyo!

title: End of World
overview: The Phantom Quest employees are up against ghosts, demons, vampires, and all the other ilk of the undead...as well as serious debt and Ayaka's potentially dangerous habits.

title: Love Me Tender
overview: The ghost of an archeologist tries to protect his former fiancée from beyond the grave.

title: Lover Come Back to Me
overview: A group of Buddhist monks have moved into town and have decided that they will take over the area's supernatural problems and putting  Yuugen Kaishya out of business...
